title: fix: update claude-airforce pricing to ~1/3 of official Sonnet 4.6
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Sustainable flights for Claude
gist.blurb: We've recalibrated the pollen rates for the claude-airforce model to ensure sustainable, long-term access while keeping it at a sweet one-third of official Sonnet 4.6 rates.
gist.summary: Recalibrated the registry pricing for the claude-airforce model to ensure sustainable access.
gist.impact: Users will experience fairer usage rates for claude-airforce that remain highly competitive compared to official Anthropic pricing.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee adjusting a dial or price tag on a retro terminal with a small airplane sticker, representing the 'airforce' model. The Nomnom creature is happily eating a tiny coin, symbolizing the updated pricing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot adjusting a glowing dial on a retro computer terminal with a tiny airplane sticker. The round tan Nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a small pixel coin. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
